zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul I of Lusignan於大約1164年出生在法國馬時，他的父親Hugues de Lusignan25歲，母親Orengarde de Rancon25歲。他和Marguerite Sibylle de Courtenay至少有2個女兒。他去世於1219年5月1日在法國波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯梅勒享年56歲，埋葬在法國o-阿爾培斯洛易豐吉布藍其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raoul I of Lusignan于大约1164年出生在法国馬时，他的父亲Hugues de Lusignan25岁，母亲Orengarde de Rancon25岁。他和Marguerite Sibylle de Courtenay至少有2个女儿。他去世于1219年5月1日在法国波特-哈倫斯多武-瑟艾福雷斯梅勒享年56岁，埋葬在法国o-阿爾培斯洛易豐吉布藍其。

meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Lusignan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Andre, Francois, Lucien, Marcel.
French: habitational name from Lusignan, a place in Vienne. This surname is very rare in France. Compare   Zeno  .

History: Jean Miel (or Amiel) dit Lusignan from Lusignan in Vienne, France, married Marie-Thérèse Latouche in Boucherville, QC, in 1699. — A French family called (de) Lusignan became enormously powerful in the eastern Mediterranean during the Middle Ages. Guy de Lusignan (1129–94) was king of Cyprus from 1192 to 1194 (and before that, by right of marriage, king of the crusader state of Jerusalem). Hugues de Lusignan was king of Cyprus from 1267 to 1284 and king of Jerusalem from 1268 to 1284. During the 14th century, Lusignans became kings of the Armenian kingdom of Cilicia (on the Mediterranean coast of what is now Turkey, facing Cyprus).

variants.name: Zeno
meanings: From the classical Greek name Zēnōn, a short form of any of several names beginning with Zēn-, the stem form of the name of Zeus, king of the gods, for example Zēnodōros ‘gift of Zeus’. Zeno was the name of two major Greek philosophers and a Christian Eastern Roman emperor ( d. 491 ). Zeno of Elea ( c.490–430 bc ) was an original thinker who challenged common-sense notions like motion and number with sophisticated logical arguments. Zeno of Citium ( c.334–262 bc ) was the founder of the Stoics.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul I of Lusignan was born about 1164, in Marche, France, his father, Hugues de Lusignan, was 25 and his mother, Orengarde de Rancon, was 25. He had at least 2 daughters with Marguerite Sibylle de Courtenay. He died on 1 May 1219, in Melle, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 56, and was buried in Font-Blanche, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul I of Lusignan est né environ 1164, à Marche, France, son père, Hugues de Lusignan, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Orengarde de Rancon, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Marguerite Sibylle de Courtenay. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1219, à Melle, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Font-Blanche, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul I of Lusignan um 1164 in Marche, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues de Lusignan 25 und seine Mutter Orengarde de Rancon 25. Er hatte mit Marguerite Sibylle de Courtenay mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Mai 1219 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Melle, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich und wurde in Font-Blanche, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul I of Lusignan è nato il circa 1164 nel Marche, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues de Lusignan, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Orengarde de Rancon, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Marguerite Sibylle de Courtenay. Morì il 1 maggio 1219, nel Melle, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Font-Blanche, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul I of Lusignanが約1164年にフランスマルチェで生まれた時，父Hugues de Lusignanは25歳，母Orengarde de Ranconは25歳であった。彼はMarguerite Sibylle de Courtenayとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1219年5月1日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツデウクス-スevレスメルで56歳で死去し，フランスルhoネ-アルペスロイアーフォント-ブランチェにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul I of Lusignan(이)가 대략 1164년 프랑스 마체에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues de Lusignan(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Orengarde de Rancon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Marguerite Sibylle de Courtenay(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1219년 5월 1일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 데우스-스e브레스 멜에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 ho니-알프스 로이르 폰트-블랭체에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul I of Lusignan nasceu aproximadamente 1164, em Marche, França, seu pai, Hugues de Lusignan, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Orengarde de Rancon, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Marguerite Sibylle de Courtenay. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1219, em Melle, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Font-Blanche, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul I of Lusignan родился около 1164 г. в местности марч, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues de Lusignan было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Orengarde de Rancon, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Marguerite Sibylle de Courtenay. Он умер 1 мая 1219 г. в местности мелл, деукс-сeвресь, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности фонт-бланч, лоир, рoне-алпесь, Франция.

sm.estimated between 1165 and 1199: mai le e tusa o le 1165 e o'o I le 1199

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul I of Lusignan nació aproximadamente 1164, en Marche, Francia, su papá, Hugues de Lusignan, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Orengarde de Rancon, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Marguerite Sibylle de Courtenay. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1219, en Melle, Deux-Sèvres, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Font-Blanche, Loire, Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
